Motion To Vacate July 10, 2024 Order & Lift Stay; Mem Of Points & Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GRETCHEN PALMER's Motion To Vacate July 10, 2024 Order & Lift Stay.

Plaintiff Gretchen Palmer's unopposed motion to lift the arbitration stay in this case is granted. The evidence before the court establishes that, after the court's July 10, 2024 order staying the matter in favor of arbitration pursuant to the parties' agreement, defendant API Market Inc. did not pay its retainer payment to the arbitrator. (Lebowitz Dec. paras. 5-6.) The private arbitration cannot proceed until API Market makes payment. (Ex. C to Lebowitz Dec.) The arbitration bill was due more than 30 days before Palmer sought lifting of the stay. (Ex. B to Lebowitz Dec.) On these facts, API Market is in material breach of the parties' arbitration agreement and has waived its right to compel Palmer to proceed with the arbitration. (CCP section 1281.98(a)(1).) Palmer may elect to return the matter to court (id. section 1281.98(b)(1)) and has done so here.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT API MARKET, INC.'S, DBA AIKON MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Noah D. Lebowitz, Esq., Law Office of, (510) 883.3977, for Plaintiff.

Collin D. Cook, Esq., of Fisher & Phillips LLP, (415) 490-9000, for Defendant.

At the court's query, Mr. Cook offers advocacy for the Motion to be Relieved as counsel. No objections are presented. After additional consideration by the court, Collin D. Cook's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel is granted. An order is signed in open court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
